tasks.dialogue: [Ahmed - Friendly]: Hello! I am Ahmed. I [feel] a bit [shy] today. [Sandy - Encouraging]: Hi! I am Sandy. Don't be [scared]. [Ahmed - Honest]: My [English] is not [good]. I [often] stop [talking]. [Sandy - Supportive]: It is [okay]. We can [practice] together [every] day.

[Emy - Searching]: Is this the [right] room? I am [looking] for the [class]. [John - Welcoming]: Yes, it [is]. Welcome! I am John. [Emy - Worried]: I am Emy. I [always] make [mistakes] with [past] tenses. [John - Positive]: No [problem]. We are all [here] to [improve].

[John - Curious]: What is your [major], Ahmed? [Ahmed - Academic]: I study [Commerce]. I [need] English for my [future] job. [John - Technical]: Great! I am in [IT]. My [accent] is very [strong]. [Ahmed - Cooperative]: We [must] help [each] other to [speak] well.

[Sandy - Distant]: Look at this [book]. The [words] are very [new] to me. [Emy - Helping]: Let me [see]. I [know] some of [them]. [Sandy - Struggling]: I [try] to [explain] things but I [forget] the [vocabulary]. [Emy - Practical]: We can use a [dictionary] for these [difficult] parts.

[Ahmed - Observing]: The [teacher] is very [friendly], right? [Emy - Confirming]: Yes, she [speaks] slowly. I [understand] her [well]. [Ahmed - Hopeful]: I [hope] I can [answer] her [questions] tomorrow. [Emy - Advising]: Just [listen] carefully and [stay] calm.

[John - Searching]: Do you have a [pen]? I [lost] mine in the [hall]. [Sandy - Kind]: Here you [go]. I have an [extra] one. [John - Grateful]: Thanks! This [lesson] is about [simple] present [verbs]. [Sandy - Interested]: I [like] this topic. It [seems] very [useful].

[Ahmed - Directing]: Let’s [start] our [group] work now. [Sandy - Agreeing]: Okay. We [need] to [write] five [sentences]. [John - Ready]: I can [type] them on my [laptop] quickly. [Ahmed - Careful]: Wait, let’s [check] the [spelling] first. [John - Approving]: Good [idea], Ahmed.

[Emy - Curious]: What do you [think] of the [campus]? [Sandy - Surprised]: It is [huge]! I [got] lost this [morning]. [Emy - Sharing]: Me too! I [asked] a [guard] for [directions]. [Sandy - Happy]: I [found] the [cafeteria]. The [coffee] is [cheap].
